WFE.Sheet.Title: Weapon Form Engine
WFE.Message.UnmanagedItem: Assign a rule profile to manage this weapon's forms, states, counters, and timers.
WFE.Message.CustomRuleHelp: Paste a full weapon rule JSON object here, or load a starter/current rule and edit it. Counters, timers, actions, triggers, restrictions, and passives can all be defined here.
WFE.Error.NoPermission: You do not have permission to manage this weapon.
WFE.Error.RuleMissing: No rule profile named "{ruleId}" is registered.
WFE.Error.InvalidForm: The form "{form}" is not valid for this weapon.
WFE.Error.InvalidState: The state "{state}" is not valid for this weapon.
WFE.Error.ItemNotManaged: This weapon is not managed by Weapon Form Engine.
WFE.Error.InitializeWithoutRule: Assign a rule before initializing this weapon.
WFE.Error.ActionMissing: No action named "{actionId}" exists for this weapon.
WFE.Error.ActionUnavailable: That action is not available in the weapon's current form and state.
WFE.Error.EmptyRuleJson: Paste a JSON rule before applying it.
WFE.Error.InvalidRuleJson: The custom rule JSON could not be parsed.
WFE.Error.ProfileSyncFailed: The dnd5e weapon profile could not be synchronized.
WFE.Error.UnsupportedItem: Only dnd5e weapon items can use Weapon Form Engine.
WFE.Error.UnsupportedSystem: Weapon Form Engine is currently scoped to dnd5e.
